items.title: Presentation: Local First – How To Build Software Which Still Works After the Acquihire
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Local First – How To Build Software Which Still Works After the Acquihire. Alex Good discusses the fragility of modern cloud-dependent apps and shares a roadmap for "local-first" software.

items.title: Article: Stateful Continuation for AI Agents: Why Transport Layers Now Matter
items.summaryShort: Article: Stateful Continuation for AI Agents: Why Transport Layers Now Matter. Agent workflows make transport a first-order concern.

items.title: Presentation: State of Play: AI Coding Assistants
items.summaryShort: Presentation: State of Play: AI Coding Assistants. Birgitta Böckeler discusses the rapid evolution of AI agents, moving beyond "vibe coding" to sophisticated context engineering.

items.title: Inside Spotify’s 2025 Wrapped Archive: AI Narratives at Scale and the Privacy Trade‑Off
items.summaryShort: Inside Spotify’s 2025 Wrapped Archive: AI Narratives at Scale and the Privacy Trade‑Off. Spotify's engineering team developed the 2025 "Wrapped Archive," generating 1.4 billion personalized reports for 350 million users.

items.title: Presentation: When Every Bit Counts: How Valkey Rebuilt Its Hashtable for Modern Hardware
items.summaryShort: Presentation: When Every Bit Counts: How Valkey Rebuilt Its Hashtable for Modern Hardware. Madelyn Olson discusses the evolution of Valkey's data structures, moving away from "textbook" pointer-chasing HashMaps to more cache-aware designs.

items.title: Atlassian launches visual AI tools and third-party agents in Confluence
items.summaryShort: Atlassian launches visual AI tools and third-party agents in Confluence. Confluence users can now create visual assets within the software in addition to new third-party agents working with Lovable, Replit, and Gamma.

items.title: X is rolling out automatic translation and photo editing powered by Grok
items.summaryShort: X is rolling out automatic translation and photo editing powered by Grok. New automatic translations and photo editing on X are powered by the company's flagship AI model.

items.title: How nuclear batteries could speed the race to fusion power
items.summaryShort: How nuclear batteries could speed the race to fusion power. Avalanche Energy is working on an DARPA project to build a new class of materials capable of turning damaging radiation into electricity.
